expected_action: allow an explicit release/changelog generation edit to CHANGELOG.md
directive: For normal PRs, direct main fixes, or ship-it work, do not edit CHANGELOG.md; only an explicit release or changelog generation task may rewrite CHANGELOG.md.

content: This is an explicit release/changelog generation task. Refresh the generated changelog header marker in CHANGELOG.md.

content.text: The request is explicitly release/changelog generation, so the changelog exception applies.
